caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white dress shirt with suspenders, a red and gold bow tie, glasses, and large over-ear headphones. He wears a tall, grey, spiky novelty wig. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall with framed photographs and clothing racks displaying shirts, including one with a "LEE" brand label. Red and white logos appear on the screen, with one reading "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly. He glances forward and slightly to the side, with his mouth open as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
